summary: Among 27 analysts covering JPM, consensus is 'Moderate Buy': 11 Strong Buy, 2 Moderate Buy, 14 Hold. Last rating filed April 17, 2026. No prominent recent upgrades or downgrades of JPM itself found; the search primarily surfaced JPM analysts rating other stocks.
